sent_simp: 这个月的销售定额已经完成了。
sent_trad: 這個月的銷售定額已經完成了。
pinyin: Zhège yuè de xiāoshòu dìng'é yǐjīng wánchéng le.
english: This month's sales quota has already been met.

sent_simp: 今天的风速很快，出门要注意。
sent_trad: 今天的風速很快，出門要注意。
pinyin: Jīntiān de fēngsù hěn kuài, chūmén yào zhùyì.
english: The wind speed is very high today; be careful when you go out.

sent_simp: 他第一次来港就爱上了这里的美食。
sent_trad: 他第一次來港就愛上了這裡的美食。
pinyin: Tā dì yī cì lái Gǎng jiù àishàng le zhèlǐ de měishí.
english: He fell in love with the food here on his first visit to Hong Kong.

sent_simp: 打牌的时候他当庄家，赢了不少钱。
sent_trad: 打牌的時候他當莊家，贏了不少錢。
pinyin: Dǎ pái de shíhou tā dāng zhuāngjia, yíng le bù shǎo qián.
english: He was the banker when they played cards and won quite a bit of money.

sent_simp: 球队顺利挺进了决赛。
sent_trad: 球隊順利挺進了決賽。
pinyin: Qiúduì shùnlì tǐngjìn le juésài.
english: The team smoothly advanced into the final.

sent_simp: 公司已经制定了应急预案。
sent_trad: 公司已經制定了應急預案。
pinyin: Gōngsī yǐjīng zhìdìng le yìngjí yù'àn.
english: The company has already formulated an emergency contingency plan.

sent_simp: 欢迎各位到访我们的展厅。
sent_trad: 歡迎各位到訪我們的展廳。
pinyin: Huānyíng gèwèi dàofǎng wǒmen de zhǎntīng.
english: Welcome to all who are visiting our showroom.

sent_simp: 你在做啥子？快来帮我。
sent_trad: 你在做啥子？快來幫我。
pinyin: Nǐ zài zuò sházǐ? Kuài lái bāng wǒ.
english: What are you doing? Come help me quickly.

sent_simp: 居民联名上书，要求修缮道路。
sent_trad: 居民聯名上書，要求修繕道路。
pinyin: Jūmín liánmíng shàngshū, yāoqiú xiūshàn dàolù.
english: Residents jointly submitted a petition requesting road repairs.

sent_simp: 警察正在梳理这起案情。
sent_trad: 警察正在梳理這起案情。
pinyin: Jǐngchá zhèngzài shūlǐ zhè qǐ ànqíng.
english: Police are sorting through the details of this case.

sent_simp: 两个方案之间的差异性比较大。
sent_trad: 兩個方案之間的差異性比較大。
pinyin: Liǎng gè fāng'àn zhījiān de chāyìxìng bǐjiào dà.
english: The difference between the two plans is quite significant.

sent_simp: 她考上了北京师范大学，全家都很高兴。
sent_trad: 她考上了北京師範大學，全家都很高興。
pinyin: Tā kǎoshàng le Běijīng Shīfàn Dàxué, quánjiā dōu hěn gāoxìng.
english: She got into Beijing Normal University, and the whole family was thrilled.

sent_simp: 这本书是他们两人合著的。
sent_trad: 這本書是他們兩人合著的。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū shì tāmen liǎng rén hézhù de.
english: This book was co-authored by the two of them.

sent_simp: 这场演唱会吸引了数百万人观看。
sent_trad: 這場演唱會吸引了數百萬人觀看。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng yǎnchànghuì xīyǐn le shù bǎiwàn rén guānkàn.
english: The concert attracted several million viewers.

sent_simp: 他刚到北京，正在找地方租房。
sent_trad: 他剛到北京，正在找地方租房。
pinyin: Tā gāng dào Běijīng, zhèngzài zhǎo dìfang zūfáng.
english: He just arrived in Beijing and is looking for a place to rent.

sent_simp: 夏天蚊子很多，晚上要关窗。
sent_trad: 夏天蚊子很多，晚上要關窗。
pinyin: Xiàtiān wénzi hěn duō, wǎnshang yào guān chuāng.
english: There are lots of mosquitoes in summer; close the windows at night.

sent_simp: 看到红绿灯他赶快减速。
sent_trad: 看到紅綠燈他趕快減速。
pinyin: Kàn dào hónglǜdēng tā gǎnkuài jiǎnsù.
english: He quickly slowed down when he saw the traffic light.

sent_simp: 月底要核对一下账目。
sent_trad: 月底要核對一下賬目。
pinyin: Yuèdǐ yào héduì yīxià zhàngmù.
english: We need to check the accounts at the end of the month.

sent_simp: 球踢出边线，换对方发球。
sent_trad: 球踢出邊線，換對方發球。
pinyin: Qiú tī chū biānxiàn, huàn duìfāng fāqiú.
english: The ball went out of bounds, so the other team gets to throw it in.

sent_simp: 他是市长身边最信任的幕僚。
sent_trad: 他是市長身邊最信任的幕僚。
pinyin: Tā shì shìzhǎng shēnbiān zuì xìnrèn de mùliáo.
english: He is the most trusted aide by the mayor's side.

sent_simp: 警方捣毁了一个涉及群交的违法场所。
sent_trad: 警方搗毀了一個涉及群交的違法場所。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng dǎohuǐ le yī gè shèjí qúnjiāo de wéifǎ chǎngsuǒ.
english: Police shut down an illegal venue involved in group sex.

sent_simp: 机器翻译越来越准确了。
sent_trad: 機器翻譯越來越準確了。
pinyin: Jīqì fānyì yuèláiyuè zhǔnquè le.
english: Machine translation is getting more and more accurate.

sent_simp: 他被同事诬陷偷了公司的钱。
sent_trad: 他被同事誣陷偷了公司的錢。
pinyin: Tā bèi tóngshì wūxiàn tōu le gōngsī de qián.
english: He was framed by a colleague for stealing company money.

sent_simp: 台上的舞者动作非常优美。
sent_trad: 台上的舞者動作非常優美。
pinyin: Tái shàng de wǔzhě dòngzuò fēicháng yōuměi.
english: The dancer on stage moved with great elegance.

sent_simp: 这片土地上的土著居民已经在这里住了几千年。
sent_trad: 這片土地上的土著居民已經在這裡住了幾千年。
pinyin: Zhè piàn tǔdì shàng de tǔzhù jūmín yǐjīng zài zhèlǐ zhù le jǐ qiān nián.
english: The aboriginal people of this land have lived here for thousands of years.

sent_simp: 这家青年旅馆很受旅行者欢迎。
sent_trad: 這家青年旅館很受旅行者歡迎。
pinyin: Zhè jiā qīngnián lǚguǎn hěn shòu lǚxíngzhě huānyíng.
english: This youth hostel is very popular among travelers.

sent_simp: 短时间内学好一门语言不容易。
sent_trad: 短時間內學好一門語言不容易。
pinyin: Duǎn shíjiān nèi xuéhǎo yī mén yǔyán bù róngyì.
english: It's not easy to master a language in a short time.

sent_simp: 他对着星图找到了猎户座。
sent_trad: 他對著星圖找到了獵戶座。
pinyin: Tā duìzhe xīngtú zhǎodào le Lièhù Zuò.
english: He used the star atlas to locate Orion.

sent_simp: 你胆敢再迟到，我就不等你了。
sent_trad: 你膽敢再遲到，我就不等你了。
pinyin: Nǐ dǎngǎn zài chídào, wǒ jiù bù děng nǐ le.
english: If you dare to be late again, I won't wait for you.

sent_simp: 这个桃子又甜又多汁。
sent_trad: 這個桃子又甜又多汁。
pinyin: Zhège táozi yòu tián yòu duōzhī.
english: This peach is both sweet and juicy.

sent_simp: 天色越来越暗，我们得快点回家。
sent_trad: 天色越來越暗，我們得快點回家。
pinyin: Tiānsè yuèláiyuè àn, wǒmen děi kuài diǎn huíjiā.
english: It's getting darker and darker; we need to head home soon.

sent_simp: 借高利贷风险很大，要谨慎。
sent_trad: 借高利貸風險很大，要謹慎。
pinyin: Jiè gāolìdài fēngxiǎn hěn dà, yào jǐnshèn.
english: Taking out a high-interest loan is very risky; be cautious.

sent_simp: 孩子摔倒了，立刻大哭起来。
sent_trad: 孩子摔倒了，立刻大哭起來。
pinyin: Háizi shuāidǎo le, lìkè dàkū qǐlái.
english: The child fell down and immediately started crying loudly.

sent_simp: 老师在黑板上写了一个矩阵让我们计算。
sent_trad: 老師在黑板上寫了一個矩陣讓我們計算。
pinyin: Lǎoshī zài hēibǎn shàng xiě le yī gè jǔzhèn ràng wǒmen jìsuàn.
english: The teacher wrote a matrix on the board for us to calculate.

sent_simp: 蜜蜂和花之间是一种共生关系。
sent_trad: 蜜蜂和花之間是一種共生關係。
pinyin: Mìfēng hé huā zhījiān shì yī zhǒng gòngshēng guānxi.
english: The relationship between bees and flowers is a form of symbiosis.

sent_simp: 她眼里带着笑意，心情很好。
sent_trad: 她眼裡帶著笑意，心情很好。
pinyin: Tā yǎn lǐ dàizhe xiàoyì, xīnqíng hěn hǎo.
english: Her eyes carried a smiling expression; she was in a great mood.

sent_simp: 两国就防务合作进行了会谈。
sent_trad: 兩國就防務合作進行了會談。
pinyin: Liǎng guó jiù fángwù hézuò jìnxíng le huìtán.
english: The two countries held talks on defense cooperation.

sent_simp: 法院最终为他平反，还了他清白。
sent_trad: 法院最終為他平反，還了他清白。
pinyin: Fǎyuàn zuìzhōng wèi tā píngfǎn, huán le tā qīngbái.
english: The court finally rehabilitated him and restored his innocence.

sent_simp: 他们结婚前已经在计划买房了。
sent_trad: 他們結婚前已經在計劃買房了。
pinyin: Tāmen jiéhūn qián yǐjīng zài jìhuà mǎifáng le.
english: They were already planning to buy a house before getting married.

sent_simp: 周末我们去植物园转了一圈。
sent_trad: 週末我們去植物園轉了一圈。
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒmen qù zhíwùyuán zhuǎn le yī quān.
english: We took a stroll around the botanical garden over the weekend.
